title: FormVersion
description: Immutable snapshot of a Form's schema at a point in time. Captures field definitions, validation rules, conditional-visibility logic, and multi-locale label bundles. Once a FormSubmission exists against a version, the version is version-locked — mutations to the parent Form flow through a new version. Rollback swaps Form.published_version_id back to the previous FormVersion; the current form's fields, validators, and labels ALL come from the version, not the parent Form.

version_number.description: Monotonic per-form. First draft = 1; subsequent drafts increment.

status.description: draft / published / superseded / archived. `published` matches Form.published_version_id.

schema.description: The form schema. Shape: { fields: [{ key, type, label_key, required, validators, conditional_visibility, options?, default? }], sections: [{ title_key, description_key, field_keys }], layout: 'single_page' | 'stepped' | 'wizard' }.

labels.description: Locale bundle. Shape: { <locale>: { <label_key>: string } }. Every label_key referenced in `schema` must resolve in every locale in Form.locales_available.

submission_count.description: Number of completed submissions against this version. Locks the version when > 0.

x-invariants: schema is IMMUTABLE once submission_count > 0 — writes rejected inline.
Transitions: draft → published → superseded / archived. published never goes back to draft.
Every label_key in schema resolves in every locale in Form.locales_available (validated at publish).
superseded_at + superseded_by_version_id set together on supersession.
